E:\software\cmake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\GameEngine.dir/objects.a
C:\PROGRA~1\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\GameEngine.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\GameEngine.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\PROGRA~1\mingw64\bin\C__~1.EXE -shared -o F:\yxy\GameEngine\engin\bin\libGameEngine.dll -Wl,--out-implib,F:\yxy\GameEngine\engin\bin\libGameEngine.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\GameEngine.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\GameEngine.dir\linkLibs.rsp
